name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union is a global money transfer service enabling customers to send and receive money internationally with competitive exchange rates and variable fees starting from $0.
description_long: Western Union is an established money transfer company that facilitates sending and receiving money across the United States and to over 200 countries and territories worldwide. The company operates an extensive network allowing customers to transfer funds electronically with real-time exchange rate pricing. Western Union's primary service offering includes international money transfers, with a focus on providing competitive foreign exchange rates and fee structures that vary based on transfer method and destination country. The company distinguishes itself through its global reach, covering virtually every country and currency, combined with promotional offers such as zero-fee first transfers for registered users and competitive exchange rates that are transparently displayed before transaction completion. The exchange rate spreads are particularly visible on their platform—for example, showing rates ranging from 16.9723 to 17.6573 MXN per USD depending on the service tier selected. Western Union's honest positioning requires acknowledging that while they offer competitive first-transfer pricing and registration incentives, their fee structure remains variable and can reach up to $1.99 USD on standard transfers. The service is best suited for customers with established international transfer needs rather than casual or one-time senders, as the fee savings accumulate primarily for registered users engaging in repeated transfers. Their extensive currency and country coverage makes them particularly valuable for immigrants and individuals with family abroad, though customers should compare rates across multiple providers for large transfers.
pros: Zero-fee promotion on first online international transfer for registered users
Covers 200+ countries and territories with extensive currency support
Transparent exchange rate display showing both high and low rates before commitment
Competitive fee structure starting from $0 to $1.99 USD depending on service selected
Real-time rate checking available on website before registration
User registration unlocks better exchange rates compared to unregistered transfers
Accessible online platform for sending money directly from the United States
cons: Service interruptions occur (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable per website notice)
Exchange rate spreads are significant (3.6% difference between offered rates)
Fee structure is variable and may reach $1.99 USD, which compounds on smaller transfers
Website content focuses on send functionality; receive-side user experience unclear
No pricing information displayed for domestic money orders, only international transfers
best_for: Immigrants and individuals sending money regularly to family abroad
Customers making frequent international transfers who can benefit from registered-user rates
People transferring to countries with limited banking infrastructure where Western Union has established networks
First-time users taking advantage of zero-fee promotional period
diagnosis: Western Union is best for customers with recurring international money transfer needs, particularly immigrants and those supporting family abroad, who can leverage registered-user rates and promotional incentives. The main caveat is that exchange rate spreads are material (3-4%), so customers should verify rates against competitors for large transfers, and occasional/one-time users may face higher effective costs despite the competitive headline pricing.
services: Online international money transfers from the United States
Multi-currency send functionality with real-time exchange rates
User registration for discounted exchange rates
Zero-fee first transfer promotion for new registered users
Multiple currency pair support (MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, DOP, JMD, EUR, AED, GBP, CNY, JPY, THB, and 100+ additional currencies)
Rate comparison tool showing best available pricing
Send amount calculator with receiver-gets estimator
Domestic USD transfers to United States recipients
Variable fee structure based on transfer method and destination
